meta.name: Low Profile Universal Stopper®
meta.description: Low profile protective cover for buttons and switches
meta.heroTitle: Low-Profile IP54 Protective Cover with LED Sounder
meta.heroDescription: Slimline polycarbonate cover for manual call points, push buttons and key switches. IP54-rated mounting options for dust and moisture protection with optional sounder cartridge featuring built-in LED. Available with label hood, multiple colour options and flush, surface or colour-matched frame mounting. Designed for indoor and outdoor installations where device protection against tampering, vandalism and accidental activation is required. For the domed version of the Universal Stopper click here.

options.2: #2 Surface Mount with Matching Coloured Frame
